/usr/sbin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AnatomyGui.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libAnatomyGui.so -o libAnatomyGui.so CMakeFiles/AnatomyGui.dir/src/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AnatomyGui.dir/src/platform/application_xcb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AnatomyGui.dir/src/window_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AnatomyGui.dir/src/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AnatomyGui.dir/src/platform/window_xcb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AnatomyGui.dir/src/platform/xcb_helpers.cpp.o
